ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., in progress, finished) */,
  "broadcast_network" TEXT /* Network that aired the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "club_code" TEXT /* Code of the club (team) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of seasons the player has played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drives" (
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the drive is part of */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team executing the drive */,
  "drive_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the drive */,
  "drive_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the drive */,
  "drive_total_possession_time" TEXT /* Total possession time of the drive */,
  "drive_net_yards" INTEGER /* Net yards gained during the drive */,
  "drive_plays" INTEGER /* Number of plays in the drive */,
  "drive_start_yardline" TEXT /* Yardline where the drive started */,
  "drive_end_yardline" TEXT /* Yardline where the drive ended */,
  "drive_result" TEXT /* Result of the drive (e.g., Touchdown, Punt, Turnover) */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers during the drive */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties incurred during the drive */,
  "play_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of play IDs for the drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drives_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drives_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with, if applicable */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions the user has within the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
